## Changes Summary

### Version 0.0.2 Highlights
1. **Splash Screen Implementation**
   - Professional branded startup experience
   - Version display from assembly attributes
   - 3-second auto-close timer
   - Click-to-close functionality
   - Smooth transition to main window

2. **Custom Startup Sequence**
   - Override of `OnStartup` in App.xaml.cs
   - Manual window management
   - Event-based window transitions

3. **Documentation Updates**
   - All project documentation updated to v0.0.2
   - New diagrams and flow charts
   - Complete API documentation for SplashWindow
   - Architecture Decision Record for splash screen
